title: Satisfying Sounds
description: A simple sound pack that replaces common sounds with satisfying thocks and lego sounds.
body:
**Satisfying Sounds**
This sound pack changes the following sounds:
- Breaking blocks
- Exp Pickup Sounds (Good for Hypixel/Skyblock)
- Placing sounds
- Death Sounds
- Player Damage
It replaces the sounds with satisfying sounds, like lego death sounds and popping sounds.
